title: Demo § 3.303 — Direct service connection
passage: A claim for compensation requires (1) a current diagnosed condition, (2) an in-service event or exposure, and (3) a medical nexus linking the two. The claimant bears the burden of producing competent evidence on each element.

title: Demo § 3.310 — Secondary service connection and aggravation
passage: A condition that is proximately due to or aggravated by an established service-connected condition is itself service-connected. The contributing-cause standard does not require sole causation; partial causation suffices.

title: Demo § 3.159(c)(4) — Duty to provide adequate examination
passage: When the agency provides a medical examination, the examination must be adequate, supported by reasoned analysis, and address all relevant theories of entitlement raised by the record.

title: Demo § 5107(b) — Benefit-of-the-doubt
passage: When the evidence for and against an issue material to the claim is in approximate balance, reasonable doubt is resolved in favor of the claimant.
